chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 137 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.574/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.575/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 01.02.2024 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Assistant Director (Law) of Election Commission of Pakistan, Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General, Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General and Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh, present in Court in other matters, waive notice of this petition. After hearing this petition, with consent of all present, it is ordered that the Election Commission of Pakistan shall ensure security in terms of Section 59 of the Elections Act, 2017 in PS-34, Naushahro Feroze-III. The petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
